name: ENBRIDGE INC
summary: Enbridge Inc. is a Canadian energy infrastructure company operating liquids pipelines, gas transmission, gas distribution and storage, and renewable power generation businesses. It transports crude oil, natural gas, and natural gas liquids (NGL) across North America, distributes natural gas through regulated utilities in Canada and the US, and generates renewable energy including wind and solar power.
